title: strychnos pentantha
intro: Strychnos pentantha, also known as the African strychnine tree or strychnine bush, is a plant species in the Strychnaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant's roots and seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Strychnos pentantha include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions, although its use should be cautious due to the presence of toxic compounds. Strychnos pentantha is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, but its preparation and consumption should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
